ingredients.text: farine de BLE T65 sans feve

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: pain campagne (39%) (farine de BLE T65 sans feve, eau, mélange 5 graines (millet, lin brun, lin jaune, pavot, tournesol), sel, levure, farine de seigle (GLUTEN) toastée, farine d'orge (GLUTEN) toastée, farine de mais toastée, enzymes), jambon cuit supérieur (20%) (Jambon de porc , gras et couenne de porc, sel, sirop de glucose, dextrose, antioxydant E316, aromes , conservateur E250), tomate (16%), EMMENTAL (9%), salade mélangée (8%) (Chicorée rouge, Frisée, Pain de sucre,  Scarole), BEURRE léger doux a 40% MG (6%)
